skill.name: pexoai-agent
skill.description: Use this skill when the user wants to produce a short video (5–120 seconds). Supports any video type: product ads, TikTok/Instagram/YouTube content, brand videos, explainers, social clips. USE FOR: video production, AI video, make a video, product video, brand video, promotional clip, explainer video, short video.
skill.summary: AI video creation agent that handles scriptwriting, shot composition, transitions, and music for short videos (5-120 seconds).
skill.author: pexoai

security_audit.summary: This is a legitimate video generation API client for Pexo AI. Static analysis flagged 534 potential issues, but evaluation reveals these are primarily false positives. Shell commands are standard API operations (curl, jq). File access is limited to user-provided assets and standard config locations. No evidence of malicious intent, data exfiltration, or code injection. The skill follows safe patterns for API client implementations.

medium_findings.title: Shell Command Execution
medium_findings.description: Scripts execute external shell commands for API operations (curl, jq). This is standard and necessary for API client functionality. Commands are hardcoded with fixed arguments - no user input injection vectors detected.
medium_findings.confidence_reasoning: Pattern exists but is legitimate API client behavior. All shell commands use hardcoded API endpoints and fixed arguments.

low_findings.title: Environment Variable Access
low_findings.description: Scripts read PEXO_API_KEY and PEXO_BASE_URL from environment or config file. This is standard API client pattern for credential management.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: API key access is legitimate - required for authenticated API calls. No evidence of credential exfiltration.

low_findings.title: Filesystem Access to Config Directory
low_findings.description: Scripts access ~/.pexo/config and ~/.pexo/tmp for configuration and caching. Standard Unix convention for application data.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: Config access is standard and necessary for API client initialization. No sensitive system files accessed.

low_findings.title: Static Analyzer False Positives - Weak Crypto Flags
low_findings.description: The static analyzer flagged 'weak cryptographic algorithm' at multiple script headers. This is a false positive - the scripts do not use any cryptographic algorithms. The analyzer may be misinterpreting $RANDOM variable names or file header comments.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: No cryptographic functions found in codebase. MD5, weak RNG, or crypto algorithm references - none exist. Clear false positive.

content.user_title: Create professional short videos with AI
content.value_statement: Users struggle to produce professional videos quickly. This skill connects to Pexo AI to handle scriptwriting, shot composition, and production, delivering polished 5-120 second videos for product ads, social content, and brand videos.
actual_capabilities: Generate short videos (5-120 seconds) in 16:9, 9:16, or 1:1 aspect ratios
Handle full video production workflow: scriptwriting, shots, transitions, music
Process user-uploaded images, videos, or audio in video generation
Multi-language support: respond in the user's language
Polling and status tracking for async video generation
Professional quality output using AI cinematography expertise
limitations: Requires valid PEXO_API_KEY and active Pexo account with credits
Video length limited to 5-120 seconds per generation
Output quality depends on Pexo AI backend availability and model capabilities
No offline capability - requires internet connection to Pexo API

use_cases.title: Marketing video creation
use_cases.description: Generate product advertisements and brand videos by describing the product or uploading images. Ideal for e-commerce, startups, and small businesses needing quick promotional content.

use_cases.title: Social media content production
use_cases.description: Create TikTok, Instagram Reels, and YouTube Shorts by providing a concept or uploaded assets. Perfect for content creators and social media managers needing rapid video turnaround.
use_cases.target_user: Content creators and social media managers

use_cases.title: Quick explainer and tutorial videos
use_cases.description: Produce short explainer videos or tutorial clips by describing the topic. Useful for educators, trainers, and internal communications teams.

prompt_templates.title: Basic video request
prompt_templates.prompt: I want a video about [topic description]
prompt_templates.scenario: Simple video generation with a text description of the video concept

prompt_templates.title: Product video with assets
prompt_templates.prompt: I want a product video for my [product type]. Here is the product image: [attach image]
prompt_templates.scenario: Video generation using uploaded product images or assets

prompt_templates.title: Style-specified video
prompt_templates.prompt: Make a [style] video about [topic]. The video should be [duration] long in [aspect ratio] format.
prompt_templates.scenario: Detailed video request with style, duration, and format specifications

prompt_templates.title: Multi-shot video project
prompt_templates.prompt: Create a [duration] video with these elements: [shot list]. Use [style or mood] and include [any specific requirements].
prompt_templates.scenario: Complex video project with multiple shots and detailed creative direction

output_examples.input: I want a product video for my new headphones
output_examples.output: Your video request has been submitted to Pexo. Estimated time: 15-20 minutes. Track progress at https://pexo.ai/project/[project_id]
视频请求已提交给 Pexo。预计时间: 15-20 分钟。在此处查看进度: https://pexo.ai/project/[project_id]

best_practices: Upload original images or assets when available for better video quality
Relay user requests exactly as written to leverage Pexo's professional prompt engineering
Let Pexo ask clarifying questions rather than guessing at creative direction
anti_patterns: Do not add detailed style descriptions, duration, or aspect ratio unless the user specifically requested them
Do not modify or improve user messages with your own creative ideas
Do not skip the pexo-doctor.sh setup check if encountering configuration errors

faq.question: What video formats and lengths does this skill support?
faq.answer: Videos can be 5-120 seconds long and support three aspect ratios: 16:9 (landscape), 9:16 (vertical), and 1:1 (square).

faq.question: Do I need an API key to use this skill?
faq.answer: Yes. You need a PEXO_API_KEY configured in ~/.pexo/config. Run pexo-doctor.sh if you encounter configuration errors.

faq.question: How long does video generation take?
faq.answer: Video generation typically takes 15-20 minutes for short videos. The skill polls for status and notifies you when complete.

faq.question: Can I use my own images or videos in the generated content?
faq.answer: Yes. Upload your assets using pexo-upload.sh and wrap the returned asset ID in the appropriate tag like <original-image> when sending your request.

faq.question: Why should I copy the user's message exactly?
faq.answer: Pexo's backend has professional prompt engineering. Adding your own creative direction can reduce video quality. The skill is designed to be a delivery worker, not a creative director.

faq.question: What languages does this skill support?
faq.answer: The skill responds in the same language the user writes in. This applies to all messages including questions, status updates, and error messages.
